name: Farcaster (Neynar)
pricing_notes: Free: 100 req/day; Starter $49/mo (100K req); Growth $249/mo; Enterprise custom

auth.notes: Neynar API key from dashboard; some endpoints require Farcaster signer for write operations

performance.notes: Neynar API response ~150ms; real-time webhooks via Neynar WebSocket or webhook

agent_readiness.notes: Neynar is the primary developer API for Farcaster (decentralized social protocol). Read/write casts (posts), manage channels, follow/unfollow users, fetch feed. Write operations require a Farcaster signer. Webhook support for real-time events. TypeScript/Python SDKs. Used by most Farcaster apps and bots.

gotchas: Neynar is a third-party hosted API, not the Farcaster protocol itself
Write operations require managing a Farcaster signer (key management complexity)
best_when: Building Farcaster clients, bots, or analytics tools
Agents posting to or monitoring crypto/Web3 social discourse
Real-time monitoring of Farcaster channels via webhooks
avoid_when: High-volume social media analysis (Twitter/Reddit larger audience)
Budget-constrained teams (paid tiers required for meaningful use)
summary: Neynar provides the primary developer API for Farcaster, a decentralized social protocol popular in the crypto/Web3 community. Read/write casts, manage channels, webhooks for real-time events. TypeScript/Python SDKs. Write operations require Farcaster signer key management. Used by most Farcaster apps and bots. Best for Web3/crypto social applications and agents monitoring crypto discourse.
